name: chain_i_built_a_tool_that_turns_a_restaurants
method: I built a tool that turns a restaurant's PDF menu into a professional digital me

stages.task: Scrape Google Maps/Yelp for restaurants with PDF menus on their websites. Extract PDF URLs and owner contact info.
Download PDFs, use Claude to extract menu items/prices/sections, generate clean HTML digital menu page per restaurant.
Deploy each generated menu page to unique surge.sh URL as a free preview.
Cold email restaurant owner with preview link: 'I digitized your menu for free — want to use it? $29/mo or $199 one-time.' Use existing cold email scripts.
